title: Tenant scope field
review_summary_text: Claude found the S03 tenant-scope implementation scope-compliant with no blocking findings. It confirmed same-tenant enforcement, no-real-data/no-write boundaries, and RP00.P01.M07.S01 handoff. Four P3 notes were recorded: disposition convention could not be independently verified from the diff, redundant prefix guard retained for error clarity, a dead gated S02 registry-nextSubphase branch could be removed for clarity, and an uppercase test nuance remains adequately covered by other canonical-pattern cases.

findings.title: Disposition status consistency could not be verified from diff
findings.details: Claude could not independently verify the validator disposition convention and asked to confirm it after evidence lands.
findings.recommendation: Run final RP00 validator after closeout evidence creation.

findings.title: Redundant prefix guard
findings.details: Claude noted the startsWith lfos_ check is logically subsumed by the anchored tenant-id regex.
findings.recommendation: No action required; retain for clearer error messages and consistency with existing identifier and tenant normalizers.

findings.title: Dead gated S02 registry-nextSubphase branch
findings.details: Claude noted the historical S02 registry-nextSubphase assertion is now gated false after advancing currentContractSubphaseId to S03.
findings.recommendation: No action required for closeout; retaining historical invariant shape is acceptable and non-blocking.

findings.title: Uppercase test nuance
findings.details: Claude noted LFOS_demo_tenant_layout trips the prefix guard rather than the lowercase pattern path.
findings.recommendation: No action required; double-underscore and other invalid cases exercise pattern rejection and coverage is adequate for this slice.

P3.title: Disposition status consistency could not be verified from diff
